title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: desktop-file-utils bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for desktop-file-utils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: .desktop files are used to describe an application for inclusion in GNOME or KDE menus.  This package contains desktop-file-validate which checks whether a .desktop file complies with the specification at http://www.freedesktop.org/standards/, and desktop-file-install which installs a desktop file to the standard directory, optionally fixing it up in the process.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update allowed DEs in desktop-file-validate (JIRA:RHEL-107113)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for desktop-file-utils is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

.desktop files are used to describe an application for inclusion in GNOME or KDE menus.  This package contains desktop-file-validate which checks whether a .desktop file complies with the specification at http://www.freedesktop.org/standards/, and desktop-file-install which installs a desktop file to the standard directory, optionally fixing it up in the process.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update allowed DEs in desktop-file-validate (JIRA:RHEL-107113)
